sectionHeading.heading: Everything the pipeline covers today
sectionHeading.subheading: Three registered blocks, a seed-driven apply, and a working feedback loop from Figma to Studio.

items.title: Figma MCP ingest
items.description: Pull desktop and mobile frames, extract tokens, and hand the structured output to the seed generator.

items.title: Namespaced block.* types
items.description: Every block lives under a `block.*` _type, mapped to a React component by the UI BlockRenderer.

items.title: Apply the same seed safely
items.description: Seed keys derive from the Figma node id, so re-running updates the same block — no duplicates, no drift.
